name: Jamey Helsman
shortBio: A longtime Midnight Productions performer whose history with this show stretches back decades.
fullBio: Jamey Helsman first auditioned for Midnight Productions' Jesus Christ Superstar in 1994 and has remained part of the company family ever since. Over the years he has built lifelong friendships through the production and has cherished sharing the Keswick stage with his daughters. He now lives in North Carolina, has worked the same sales job since 2007, and has coached high school baseball since 2015. He thanks his family, extended family, and friends for supporting the show throughout the years.
